---
name: Bug or content error
about: Report a typo, broken link, or incorrect code example
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## Location

Which file or lesson is affected? (e.g. `days/day-09-objects/README.md`)

## Description

Describe what is incorrect, confusing, or broken.

## Suggested Fix

If you have a suggested correction, describe it here.
